topic: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses)

passage.title: A Day with Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses)
passage.text: I have been living here for two years. I have been living here since 2020. She has been studying for three hours. She has been studying since morning. We have been friends for five years. We have been friends since college. He has not done this work for a week. He has not done this work since Monday. I have known this for ten years. I have known this since 2015.
passage.hindiTranslation: मैं दो साल से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ। मैं 2020 से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ। वह तीन घंटे से पढ़ रही है। वह सुबह से पढ़ रही है। हम पाँच साल से दोस्त हैं। हम कॉलेज के समय से दोस्त हैं। उसने एक हफ्ते से यह काम नहीं किया। उसने सोमवार से यह काम नहीं किया। मुझे दस साल से यह जानकारी है। मुझे 2015 से यह जानकारी है।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I have been living..."?
options: He has not done this work since Monday.
I have been waiting for an hour.
I have been living here since 2020.
I have been living here for two years.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I have been living here for two years.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I have been living here for two years."
